purpose: Test retrieval, citation grounding, vector store updates, and contract review quality.
intentional_retrieval_traps: Legacy policy conflicts with current policy on liability caps and auto-renewal.
SaaS agreement mentions AI model training and personal data, requiring privacy guidance retrieval.
IP ownership playbook and sample contracts use overlapping terms such as deliverables, tools, templates, improvements, and workflows.
Governing law preferences differ by jurisdiction and current policy allows only specific jurisdictions without escalation.
